hyperedges.description: RAG for information retrieval, MCP for data access and actions, Sub-Agents for intra-app teamwork, A2A for cross-organization agent communication - each pattern has distinct use cases as explained by Google Cloud Tech

AI-powered editors and development tools competing in the 2025-2026 landscape: Superset integrates Claude Code and Gemini, Cursor and Windsurf lead in AI-assisted editing, Warp and Ghosty offer terminal-based AI workflows
hyperedges.source_file: docs/20260408-Superset-AIエディター-全部入り-徹底解説-まさおAI.html

hyperedges.description: NotebookLM connects to MCP for external tool access, Claude Code automates workflows with NotebookLM, NotebookLM CLI extends capabilities for blog/image generation, and n8n integrates MCP for automated workflows - forming a connected AI automation ecosystem
